sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62998" key="lh|th=res" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῃτ-ῆρες·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱεροὶ στεφανηφόροι</foreign> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Athamanian</placeName>), Id.</entryFree>
